    • Oncology Data Diagnostic Template

Improve unmapped concept mappings using an LLM with vocabulary search tools

Source: R/improve_mappings.R
improve_mappings.Rd

Queries DuckDB staging tables for records that failed vocabulary mapping (concept_id = 0), then for each unmapped source value, uses an LLM (Claude or GPT-4) with Hecate semantic search and OMOPHub code lookup tools to find the best OMOP concept mapping.

Usage

improve_mappings(
  con,
  config = NULL,
  domains = c("condition", "drug", "measurement", "measurement_value", "procedure",
    "observation"),
  limit = 50L,
  confidence_threshold = 0.7,
  custom_mapping_path = NULL,
  custom_ndc_mapping_path = NULL,
  log_path = "mapping_improvement_log.csv",
  provider = NULL,
  model = NULL,
  api_key = NULL,
  hecate = NULL,
  omophub = NULL,
  force_retry = FALSE,
  delay = 0.5,
  dry_run = FALSE
)

Arguments

con

DBI connection to the DuckDB database (post-ETL, staging + CDM tables must exist).

config

ETL config list (for schema names). Default: default_etl_config().

domains

Character vector of domains to improve. Default: all five.

limit

Max unmapped source values to process per domain (ordered by record count).

confidence_threshold

Minimum confidence to write to production CSV. Default: 0.7.

custom_mapping_path

Path to production custom_concept_mapping.csv. Default: from config or package default.

custom_ndc_mapping_path

Path to custom NDC mapping CSV. Default: from config or package default.

log_path

Path to detailed log CSV. Default: "mapping_improvement_log.csv".

provider

LLM provider: "anthropic" or "openai". Default: auto-detected from API keys (prefers Anthropic if both are set).

model

Model name. Default: ANTHROPIC_MODEL / "claude-sonnet-4-20250514" for Anthropic, OPENAI_MODEL / "gpt-4o" for OpenAI.

api_key

API key. Default: from ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY env var based on provider.

hecate

Hecate client object. Default: created from env vars.

omophub

OMOPHub client object. Default: created from env vars. Used for NDC lookups.

force_retry

Controls which values are (re)processed.

  • FALSE (default): skip only successes (concept_id > 0 and confidence >= threshold). Retry failures and process new unmapped values from staging. This uses the same source as export_unmapped_drugs(): unmapped rows in stg.map_drug_order (and equivalent for other domains).

  • "fail": only retry failed log entries. Uses the mapping log file only - rows where concept_id is missing or <= 0. Does not query staging, so the list will not match export_unmapped_drugs(); use default force_retry = FALSE to process the same set as unmapped exports.

  • "all": skip ALL values already in the log (including failures). Only process new unmapped values from staging.

  • TRUE: ignore the log entirely - reprocess everything (staging unmapped + all previously logged values).

delay

Seconds to wait between LLM API calls (rate limiting). Default: 0.5.

dry_run

If TRUE, show what would be processed without calling LLM.

Value

Invisible data.frame of all log results.

Details

The function provides the LLM with rich context: both the source code AND the human-readable name for each unmapped value (e.g., both the NDC code and the drug name), enabling more accurate mapping.

Results are written to a detailed log CSV and, for high-confidence mappings, appended to the custom_concept_mapping.csv and custom_ndc_mapping.csv files that the ETL consumes.

Pipeline integration


# 1. Run ETL
run_etl(con)

# 2. Improve unmapped concepts
improve_mappings(con, limit = 50, confidence_threshold = 0.7)

# 3. Re-run ETL from vocab step to pick up new mappings
run_etl(con, from_step = "30_vocab")
